chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP 7805 of 2018 CP 7806 of 2018 CP 7807 of 2018 CP 8695 of 2018 CP 8793 of 2018 CP 976 of 2018 CP 8513 of 2019 CP 291 of 2022 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.34124/2018. 2. For hearing of main case. 24.02.2025 Mr. Aimel Khan Kasi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. M. Umer Akhund, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kazi Abdul Hameed Siddiqui, Deputy Attorney General. Essentially, the petitioners claim to be aggrieved by the statutory requirement of deposit in matters of appeal, per the Foreign Exchange Regulation Act, 1947, hence, these petitions. Vide interim orders obtained herein, the effect of judgments / orders rendered against the petitioners, in adjudication proceedings per FERA, had been made redundant and any further proceedings brought to a standstill. These petitions, and interim orders herein, have been pending since 2018 onwards notwithstanding that the lis is squarely covered by the judgment of a Division Bench of this Court in Pak Terry Mills1; as amplified by a subsequent judgment of another Division Bench of this Court in Zilay Nawab2. Irrespective of law having been settled in such regard, these petitions remained on the docket; clubbed with an unrelated bunch of petitions. Therefore, in mutatis mutandis application of the reasoning and rationale illumined in the judgments cited supra, these petitions are found to be misconceived and devoid of merit; hence, hereby dismissed, along with all pending applications. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in each connected file.

Therefore, in mutatis mutandis application of the reasoning and rationale illumined in the judgments cited supra, these petitions are found to be misconceived and devoid of merit; hence, hereby dismissed, along with all pending applications. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in each connected file. Judge Judge Judge Khuhro/PA 1 Per Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui J in judgment dated 21.06.2024 rendered in Pak Terry Mills Pvt. Ltd. vs. Federation of Pakistan & Others (CP D 3066 of 2024). 2 Per Muhammad Junaid Ghaffar J in judgment dated 21.08.2024 rendered in Saiyid Zilay A Nawab Rizvi. vs. State Bank of Pakistan & Others (CP D 3968 of 2024).
